'''votafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyc|nyc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyc|nyc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| votafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:votafithi|votafithi]] || [[word:votafiji|votafiji]] || [[word:votafishi|votafishi]] || [[word:votafiki|votafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:votafuthuthu|votafuthuthu]] || [[word:votafujuju|votafujuju]] || [[word:votafushushu|votafushushu]] || [[word:votafukuku|votafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:votafuthu|votafuthu]] || [[word:votafuju|votafuju]] || [[word:votafushu|votafushu]] || [[word:votafuku|votafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:votafufthuf|votafufthuf]] || [[word:votafufjuf|votafufjuf]] || [[word:votafufshuf|votafufshuf]] || [[word:votafufkuf|votafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:votafethe|votafethe]] || [[word:votafeje|votafeje]] || [[word:votafeshe|votafeshe]] || [[word:votafeke|votafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:votafothotho|votafothotho]] || [[word:votafojojo|votafojojo]] || [[word:votafoshosho|votafoshosho]] || [[word:votafokoko|votafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:votafotho|votafotho]] || [[word:votafojo|votafojo]] || [[word:votafosho|votafosho]] || [[word:votafoko|votafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:votafofthof|votafofthof]] || [[word:votafofjof|votafofjof]] || [[word:votafofshof|votafofshof]] || [[word:votafofkof|votafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:votafÃŸfthÃŸf|votafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfjÃŸf|votafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfshÃŸf|votafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfkÃŸf|votafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:votafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|votafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|votafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|votafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|votafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:votafÃŸfthÃŸf|votafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfjÃŸf|votafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfshÃŸf|votafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfkÃŸf|votafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:votafÃŸfthÃŸf|votafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfjÃŸf|votafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfshÃŸf|votafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votafÃŸfkÃŸf|votafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:votafÃḊthÃḊ|votafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:votafÃḊjÃḊ|votafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:votafÃḊshÃḊ|votafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:votafÃḊkÃḊ|votafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:votafathatha|votafathatha]] || [[word:votafajaja|votafajaja]] || [[word:votafashasha|votafashasha]] || [[word:votafakaka|votafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:votafatha|votafatha]] || [[word:votafaja|votafaja]] || [[word:votafasha|votafasha]] || [[word:votafaka|votafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:votafafthaf|votafafthaf]] || [[word:votafafjaf|votafafjaf]] || [[word:votafafshaf|votafafshaf]] || [[word:votafafkaf|votafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:votafasha|votafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:votafshÃḋsha|votafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votafrosha|votafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votafmusha|votafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:votafyasha|votafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotafnkshÃḋsha|govotafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotafnkrosha|govotafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotafnkmusha|govotafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotafnkyasha|govotafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:votatafasha|votatafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:votatafshÃḋsha|votatafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votatafrosha|votatafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votatafmusha|votatafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:votatafyasha|votatafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotatafnkshÃḋsha|govotatafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotatafnkrosha|govotatafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotatafnkmusha|govotatafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotatafnkyasha|govotatafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vetÃḊfasha|vetÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vetÃḊfshÃḋsha|vetÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vetÃḊfrosha|vetÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vetÃḊfmusha|vetÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vetÃḊfyasha|vetÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govetÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|govetÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govetÃḊfnkrosha|govetÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govetÃḊfnkmusha|govetÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govetÃḊfnkyasha|govetÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:votfafasha|votfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:votfafshÃḋsha|votfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votfafrosha|votfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votfafmusha|votfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:votfafyasha|votfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotfafnkshÃḋsha|govotfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotfafnkrosha|govotfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotfafnkmusha|govotfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotfafnkyasha|govotfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
